jokes.text: Well, needless to say, people are still talking about me in Barcelona. / I bet they are.

dialogue.line: Well, needless to say, people are still talking about me in Barcelona.

dialogue.line: I bet they are.

jokes.text: Murray, who's this guy? / I'm getting to that, Jemaine, all right? That's in the agenda under Todd.
